content.en:
Dongyuan Mountain.

This is one of the treasure mountains of the Source Sea, which exists in the void gap of the Source Sea.

The void of the Source Sea is extremely stable, even if it is a supreme being, it is difficult to tear the void of the Source Sea, but there are naturally unstable voids in some places, and some treasure lands will be born in the depths of the void here, and Dongyuan Mountain is one of them.

However, Dongyuan Mountain does not have an owner, because Dongyuan will be completely closed every once in a while, and no one knows exactly when it will be opened again, there seems to be no law, and many powerful supreme people do not dare to really settle in Dongyuan Mountain, what if they are trapped?

Moreover, the treasure land of Dongyuan Mountain is only a little better for cultivation, and there is only one real opportunity, and that is Dongyuan Liguang.

TECO Liguang will cause great erosion to the body of the Supreme One, but it also has the advantage that it can break the shackles to a certain extent, so some Supreme Beings will use TECO Liguang to break through the realm.

Of course, those supreme beings who think they have high potential and are expected to be at a higher level will not use TECO Liguang to break through.

"The sequelae of TECO's separation of light are even greater than those of the original source liquid, and the effect is very average, and it can only have an effect on the impact of the first supreme and the second supreme. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, he had no interest in TECO.

And the time for the Heavenly Wind Source God to become the Supreme One was not very long, so he had no interest in Dongyuan Liguang, unless he stayed in the One Supreme Realm for an infinite number of years, he would choose to break through the realm in this way.

However, even if TECO makes a breakthrough from the light, the success rate is not necessarily high.

I have to say that the Netherworld Hall Lord is very risky this time.

In order to impact the realm of the Dual Supreme this time, the Netherworld Hall Lord spent almost half of his wealth to buy various treasures to assist in breaking through, plus a variety of treasures to heal Dong Yuan's injuries before the news was leaked.

Otherwise, the Heavenly Wind Source God didn't know that the Netherworld Hall Lord would go to Dongyuan Mountain to attack the Dual Supreme Realm.

At this time, Ye Tian and the Heavenly Wind Source God came to Dongyuan Mountain early, preparing to ambush here.

"Ye Tian, when the Netherworld Hall Lord starts his retreat under the light of Dong Yuan, we will take advantage of his critical moment to make a move, so that we will severely damage him and kill him. The Heavenly Wind Source God reminded.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian didn't say anything, nor did he reveal that he could easily kill the Netherworld Hall Master.

Since the Heavenly Wind Source God has arranged it this way, then arrange it like this.

Time passed slowly, and finally on this day, the Lord of the Netherworld Hall came to Dongyuan Mountain.

However, the face of the Heavenly Wind Source God changed.

It's just because this time the Netherworld Hall Lord didn't come to Dongyuan Mountain alone, and he also brought a supreme being.

"It's him!"

The Heavenly Wind Source God looked at the face of the person displayed on a source weapon in his hand, and was immediately embarrassed.

He immediately put away the source device and stopped snooping, lest the Supreme One detect it.

"What's wrong?"

Ye Tian asked.

Tianfeng Source Divine Dao: "The supreme who came with the master of the Netherworld Temple is very powerful, although he is not a double supreme, but his strength is at the top in the realm of the first supreme one, the other party is not a son of the void, but it is said that he has an extraordinary background, and his real strength is not weaker than the top son of the void, he is much stronger than the master of the Netherworld Temple." "

"The other party is here to protect the Dharma?"

Ye Tian guessed.

"It should be like this!" Tianfeng Source God smiled bitterly: "It seems that we underestimated the Netherworld Hall Master, he should also be afraid of other people's surprise attacks, so we invited this Tea Sea Source God to protect the Dharma, if there is a Tea Sea Source God Protector, it is very difficult for us to kill the Netherworld Hall Lord." "

"Do you still do it?"

Ye Tian said.

The Heavenly Wind Source God hesitated for a long time, and finally nodded and said: "Do it, but it's not to kill the Netherworld Hall Master, but to sabotage his promotion at a critical moment, once you do it at a critical moment, the Netherworld Hall Lord will inevitably be hit hard, at least for a long time, you won't be able to impact the Double Supreme Realm again." Although the God of Tea Sea Source is powerful, it can't kill us. "

"It's good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Somewhere in Dongyuan Mountain, this area is the area where TECO Liguang is located, and TECO Liguang covers this area.

At this time, there were six Tier One Supreme Beings who were attacking the Realm of Twin Beings here.

Of course, every Supreme One will set up a defensive array to forbid others from interfering with him.

Under normal circumstances, other supreme beings would not come here to sabotage the promotion of other supreme beings.

In addition, TECO covers a wide area of distance, so it does not affect each other.

The Lord of the Netherworld Temple and the God of the Tea Sea have come here.

I saw that the Lord of the Netherworld Hall had arranged a large defensive array, and then entered the Dongyuan Liguang area, while the God of the Tea Sea Source was guarding outside to prevent anyone from interfering with the cultivation of the Lord of the Netherworld Temple.

As soon as he entered the Dongyuan Liguang area, the endless Dongyuan Liguang poured into the body of the Netherworld Hall Lord.

Even if he wore a source guard and protected himself with the supreme skill of protecting his body, he still couldn't completely block Dongyuan Liguang.

Besides, he wouldn't really try to block Dongyuan Liguang, otherwise how would he impact the realm of the Double Supreme?

I saw that the Lord of the Netherworld Temple took the initiative to absorb the Dongyuan Liguang and let the Dongyuan Liguang affect his body.

As the light of the Eastern Yuan continued to erode, the body of the Netherworld Hall Lord was rapidly decaying like a rotten piece of iron.

Immediately, the Nether Hall Lord took out a large number of treasures that could stop this decay and swallowed them one by one, so that it would be better.

"I can't waste time, I can't endure too long in the light of TECO, I must break through as soon as possible!"

The Nether Hall Lord muttered.

In an instant, he refined all kinds of resource treasures that assisted in breaking through into his body one by one, and used the power of Dongyuan Liguang to impact the realm of the Double Supreme One.

Bang!!!!

The body of the Netherworld Hall Lord began to undergo slight changes, and the terrifying energy impacted the shackles of the Netherworld with the help of the eternal rules, this is the imprisonment of the Source Sea to the Supreme One, as long as this imprisonment is broken, you can step into the realm of the Double Supreme One.

The Supreme One's body and soul are fused, and they are incompatible beings in the Source Sea, so it is very difficult to break through.

Even if the Netherworld Hall Lord made so many preparations and came to Dongyuan Mountain, he was not 100% sure, but at least he was 70% sure, which was enough.

"As long as there are no other supreme beings to disturb me, I have a great hope of breaking through!"

The Nether Hall Lord muttered.

Time passed slowly, and after a period of time had passed, the Heavenly Wind Source God couldn't wait.

"Ye Tian, let's do it, we can't continue to wait! You go and hold back the Chahai Source God, and I will attack the formation of the Netherworld Hall Lord and destroy his promotion. "

Heavenly Wind Source Shinto.

"Leave it to me as the God of Tea Sea Source!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Wow!

He stepped out and came to the front of the God of Tea Sea Source.
